enables: P5_5 external pilot (the judgment machine the pilot's data flows into)
intent: Compose the T4 metrics gate (aggregate_pilot) with an independent-provenance gate so T4 passes ONLY when metrics pass AND >=2 of >=3 participants clear a verified, independent, ledger-bound real_owned_stakes attestation. Closes pilot-level T4 forgery (self-dealing insider ledgers).

Review.note: 3-lens: consistency (reuses aggregate_pilot verbatim, seal pattern matches core), completeness (metrics+provenance+compose+fail-closed+all cases), correctness (AND logic, mutual independence via shared-operator prepass, ledger-head binding, decoy-author cross-check, fail-closed default)

Verify.result: 689 tests OK (679 -> 689); helix_validate PASS; pilot/owned-stakes regression clean

invariants_held: T4 passed = metrics gate passed AND independent-provenance gate passed (logical AND, fail-closed default not_passed)
each participant's real_owned_stakes attestation must be bound to that participant's own sealed ledger head
mutual independence: an operator id/org shared across participants disqualifies ALL of them (single party masquerading as many)
decoy-author attack blocked: T4 cross-checks operator against the caller's TRUSTED wedge_author_id, not the attestation's self-declared one
no single-operator, unbacked, or self-dealing set can pass; empty pilot -> not_passed
single source: metrics never reimplemented, aggregate_pilot reused verbatim
honest_ceiling: This machine JUDGES pilot data; it does not produce it. Real real_owned_stakes evidence requires an external pilot (P5_5) with independent operators running the wedge on real work — a real-world event, not autonomous code. Until then T4 stays not_passed / not judged.
p5_5_readiness: Judgment path complete end-to-end: real wedge ledgers (audit_handback) -> per-participant metrics (wedge_metrics) -> combined metrics gate (aggregate_pilot) -> independent-provenance gate (owned_stakes) -> sealed T4 verdict (t4_verdict). What remains is NON-autonomous: recruit >=3 independent external operators, run >=8 weeks, collect their sealed ledgers + owned-stakes attestations + retention/false-admit sidecar.
next: USER-DECISION: (a) commit this T4 verdict layer, (b) real-world P5_5 kickoff steps (external recruitment/publication) which only Jung Wook Yang can perform
